mapper.sql: SUM(br.bet_amount) AS totalBetAmount, SUM(br.valid_bet_amount) AS totalValidBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT br.user_id) AS userCount, SUM(br.can_win_amount) AS totalCanWinAmount, SUM(br.win_amount) AS totalWinAmount, SUM( CASE WHEN br.status IN (1, 2) THEN -br.win_lose_amount WHEN br.status = 0 THEN br.bet_amount - br.can_win_amount ELSE 0 END ) AS totalWinLose
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(br.bet_amount) AS totalBetAmount, SUM(br.valid_bet_amount) AS totalValidBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS totalOrderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT br.user_id) AS totalUserCount, SUM(br.can_win_amount) AS totalCanWinAmount, SUM(br.win_amount) AS totalWinAmount, SUM( CASE WHEN br.status IN (1, 2) THEN -br.win_lose_amount WHEN br.status = 0 THEN br.bet_amount - br.can_win_amount ELSE 0 END ) AS totalWinLose FROM t_bet_record br WHERE

SELECT br.lottery_id AS lotteryId, COUNT(DISTINCT br.issue_no) AS issueCount,
FROM t_bet_record br WHERE
GROUP BY br.lottery_id ORDER BY totalBetAmount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(br.bet_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS label, SUM(br.bet_amount) AS totalBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, SUM( CASE WHEN br.status IN (1, 2) THEN -br.win_lose_amount WHEN br.status = 0 THEN br.bet_amount - br.can_win_amount ELSE 0 END ) AS totalWinLose FROM t_bet_record br WHERE
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(br.bet_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY label ASC

SELECT br.issue_no AS label, SUM(br.bet_amount) AS totalBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, SUM( CASE WHEN br.status IN (1, 2) THEN -br.win_lose_amount WHEN br.status = 0 THEN br.bet_amount - br.can_win_amount ELSE 0 END ) AS totalWinLose FROM t_bet_record br WHERE
GROUP BY br.issue_no ORDER BY label ASC

SELECT br.lottery_id AS lotteryId, COUNT(DISTINCT br.issue_no) AS issueCount,
FROM t_bet_record br WHERE
GROUP BY br.lottery_id ORDER BY totalWinLose
ASC DESC

SELECT br.user_id AS userId, MAX(br.platform_name) AS platformName, MAX(br.platform_user_id) AS platformUserId, SUM(br.bet_amount) AS totalBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, SUM( CASE WHEN br.status IN (1, 2) THEN -br.win_lose_amount WHEN br.status = 0 THEN br.bet_amount - br.can_win_amount ELSE 0 END ) AS totalWinLose FROM t_bet_record br WHERE
GROUP BY br.user_id ORDER BY totalWinLose
ASC DESC
